/**

public class InputBuffer extends Buffer {

  /**

   */
  public ByteBuffer data;

  /**
   * Buffer presentation timestamp in microseconds.
   */
  public long presentationTimeUs;

  /**
   * @return The buffer flags.
   */
  public final int getFlags() {
    return flags;
  }

  /**
   * @param flags The buffer flags.
   */
  public final void setFlags(int flags) {
    this.flags = flags;
  }

  /**
   * @param timeUs Presentation timestamp in microseconds.
   */
  public final void setPresentationTimeUs(long timeUs) {
    this.presentationTimeUs = timeUs;
  }

  /**
   * @return Presentation timestamp in microseconds.
   */
  public final long getPresentationTimeUs() {
    return presentationTimeUs;
  }

  /**
   * The format of the input data.
   */
  public MediaFormat format;

  /**
   * Clear buffer.
   */
  @Override
  public void clear() {
    super.clear();
    if (data != null) {
      data.clear();
    }
    format = null;
  }
}

package filters.route

import com.netflix.zuul.ZuulFilter
import com.netflix.zuul.context.RequestContext
import org.apache.http.HttpHost
import org.apache.http.HttpRequest
import org.apache.http.client.HttpClient
import org.apache.http.client.methods.HttpPost
import org.apache.http.client.methods.HttpPut
import org.apache.http.entity.InputStreamEntity
import org.apache.http.impl.client.HttpClientBuilder
import org.apache.http.message.BasicHttpRequest
import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest
import java.net.URI
import java.net.URLDecoder

class SimpleHostRoutingFilter extends ZuulFilter {

    @Override
    String filterType() {
        return "route"
    }

    @Override
    int filterOrder() {
        return 1
    }

    @Override
    boolean shouldFilter() {
        return true
    }

    @Override
    Object run() {
        RequestContext context = RequestContext.getCurrentContext()
        HttpServletRequest request = context.getRequest()
        String verb = request.getMethod().toUpperCase()
        String uri = context.get("requestURI") as String
        InputStream requestEntity = request.getInputStream();
        HttpRequest httpRequest = null
        HttpClient httpclient = HttpClientBuilder.create().build();
        HttpHost httpHost = getHttpHost()

        switch (verb) {
            case 'POST':
                httpRequest = new HttpPost(uri + getSanitizedQueryString())
                InputStreamEntity entity = new InputStreamEntity(requestEntity, request.getContentLength())
                httpRequest.setEntity(entity)
                break
            case 'PUT':
                httpRequest = new HttpPut(uri + getSanitizedQueryString())
                InputStreamEntity entity = new InputStreamEntity(requestEntity, request.getContentLength())
                httpRequest.setEntity(entity)
                break;
            default:
                httpRequest = new BasicHttpRequest(verb, uri + getSanitizedQueryString())
        }

        try {
            def response = forward(httpclient, httpHost, httpRequest)
            context.set("zuulResponse", response);
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw e;
        }
        return null;
    }

    def forward(HttpClient httpclient, HttpHost httpHost, HttpRequest httpRequest) {
        return httpclient.execute(httpHost, httpRequest);
    }

    String getSanitizedQueryString() {
        String encoding = "UTF-8"
        String currentQueryString = getQueryString()
        if (currentQueryString.equals("")) {
            return ""
        }

        String decodedQueryString = URLDecoder.decode(currentQueryString, encoding)
        return new URI(null, null, null, decodedQueryString, null).toString()
    }

    String getQueryString() {
        HttpServletRequest request = RequestContext.currentContext.getRequest();
        String query = request.getQueryString()
        return (query != null) ? query : "";
    }

    HttpHost getHttpHost() {
        String host = RequestContext.currentContext.get("requestHost")
        Integer port = RequestContext.currentContext.get("requestPort") as Integer
        String scheme = RequestContext.currentContext.get("requestScheme")
        return new HttpHost(host, port, scheme)
    }
}
```

package com.github.pagehelper.util;

import com.github.pagehelper.Page;
import com.github.pagehelper.cache.Cache;
import com.github.pagehelper.cache.CacheFactory;
import com.github.pagehelper.dialect.*;
import com.github.pagehelper.page.PageAutoDialect;
import com.github.pagehelper.page.PageParams;
import org.apache.ibatis.cache.CacheKey;
import org.apache.ibatis.mapping.BoundSql;
import org.apache.ibatis.mapping.MappedStatement;
import org.apache.ibatis.mapping.ParameterMapping;
import org.apache.ibatis.reflection.MetaObject;
import org.apache.ibatis.session.Configuration;
import org.apache.ibatis.session.RowBounds;
import org.apache.ibatis.type.TypeHandlerRegistry;

import java.util.HashMap;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Map;
import java.util.Properties;

/**
 * @author liuzh
 */
public class BaseSqlUtil {

    private static final Map<String, Class<? extends Dialect>> dialectAliasMap = new HashMap<String, Class<? extends Dialect>>();
    private static final Cache<String, String> COUNT_CACHE = CacheFactory.createCache();
    private static final Cache<String, String> PAGE_SQL_CACHE = CacheFactory.createCache();

    static {
        //注册别名
        dialectAliasMap.put("hsqldb", HsqldbDialect.class);
        dialectAliasMap.put("h2", HsqldbDialect.class);
        dialectAliasMap.put("postgresql", HsqldbDialect.class);

        dialectAliasMap.put("mysql", MySqlDialect.class);
        dialectAliasMap.put("mariadb", MySqlDialect.class);
        dialectAliasMap.put("sqlite", MySqlDialect.class);

        dialectAliasMap.put("oracle", OracleDialect.class);
        dialectAliasMap.put("oracle12", Oracle12Dialect.class);

        dialectAliasMap.put("db2", Db2Dialect.class);
        dialectAliasMap.put("informix", InformixDialect.class);
        dialectAliasMap.put("sqlserver", SqlServerDialect.class);
        dialectAliasMap.put("sqlserver2012", SqlServer2012Dialect.class);
        dialectAliasMap.put("derby", SqlServer2012Dialect.class);
    }

    //缓存count查询的ms
    private static final Map<String, MappedStatement> msCountMap = new HashMap<String, MappedStatement>();

    public static MappedStatement getCountMappedStatement(MappedStatement ms) {
        return msCountMap.get(ms.getId());
    }

    public static void setCountMappedStatement(MappedStatement ms, MappedStatement countMs) {
        msCountMap.put(ms.getId(), countMs);
    }


    public static String fromJdbcUrl(String jdbcUrl) {
        for (String dialect : dialectAliasMap.keySet()) {
            if (jdbcUrl.indexOf(":" + dialect.toLowerCase() + ":") != -1) {
                return dialect;
            }
        }
        return null;
    }


    public static Dialect getDialect(String jdbcUrl, String dialectAlias, Properties properties) {
        Class<? extends Dialect> dialectClass = null;
        if (dialectAlias != null && dialectAlias.length() > 0) {
            dialectClass = dialectAliasMap.get(dialectAlias);
        }
        if (dialectClass == null && jdbcUrl != null && jdbcUrl.length() > 0) {
            String dialect = fromJdbcUrl(jdbcUrl);
            if (dialect != null) {
                dialectClass = dialectAliasMap.get(dialect);
            }
        }
        try {
            if (dialectClass != null) {
                Dialect dialect = dialectClass.newInstance();
                if (properties != null) {
                    dialect.setProperties(properties);
                }
                return dialect;
            }
        } catch (Exception e) {
            throw new RuntimeException("初始化dialect失败:" + dialectAlias, e);
        }
        throw new RuntimeException("无法获取dialect:" + dialectAlias + ", 请检查配置!");
    }

    /**
     * 获取分页参数
     *
     * @param parameterObject
     * @param rowBounds
     * @return
     */
    public static Page getPageFromObject(Object parameterObject, RowBounds rowBounds) {
        Page page = null;
        if (parameterObject instanceof PageParams) {
            page = ((PageParams) parameterObject).toPage();
        }
        if (page == null && parameterObject instanceof Map) {
            Map map = (Map) parameterObject;
            Object params = map.get("params");
            if (params instanceof PageParams) {
                page = ((PageParams) params).toPage();
            }
            if (page == null) {
                Object pageNum = map.get("pageNum");
                Object pageSize = map.get("pageSize");
                if (pageNum instanceof Number && pageSize instanceof Number) {
                    page = new Page(((Number) pageNum).intValue(), ((Number) pageSize).intValue());
                }
            }
        }
        if (page == null && rowBounds != RowBounds.DEFAULT) {
             if(rowBounds.getLimit()>0){
                 page = new Page(rowBounds.getOffset()/rowBounds.getLimit()+1,rowBounds.getLimit());
             }
        }
        return page;
    }

    /**
     * 设置分页参数
     *
     * @param parameterObject
     * @param rowBounds
     * @return
     */
    public static Page setPageFromObject(Object parameterObject, RowBounds rowBounds) {
        Page page = null;
        if (parameterObject instanceof Page) {
            page = (Page) parameterObject;
             if (page.getPageNum() == 0 && rowBounds != RowBounds.DEFAULT && rowBounds.getLimit()>0) {
                 page.setPageNum(rowBounds.getOffset()/rowBounds.getLimit()+1);
                page.setPageSize(rowBounds.getLimit());
            }
        }else {
            page = getPageFromObject(parameterObject, rowBounds);
             if (page != null && page.getPageNum() == 0 && rowBounds != RowBounds.DEFAULT && rowBounds.getLimit()>0) {
                page.setPageNum(rowBounds.getOffset()/rowBounds.getLimit()+1);
                page.setPageSize(rowBounds.getLimit());
            }
        }
        if (page != null) {
            if (page.getStartRow() == 0 && page.getPageNum() > 0) {
                //pageNum>0的情况
                page.calculateStartAndEndRow();
                 if(page.isCount()){
                     //offsetAsPageNum=false的时候，由于PageNum问题，不能使用reasonable，这里会强制为false
                     page.setReasonable(false);
                 }
            } else {
                try {
                    page = getPageFromObject(parameterObject);
                } catch (Exception e) {
                    //ignore
                }
                if (page != null && page.getStartRow() == 0 && page.getPageNum() > 0) {
                    //pageNum>0的情况
                    page.calculateStartAndEndRow();
                     if(page.isCount()){
                         //offsetAsPageNum=false的时候，由于PageNum问题，不能使用reasonable，这里会强制为false
                         page.setReasonable(false);
                     }
                }

            }
            if(page.getPageSize()<=0){
                page.setPageSize(Page.DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE);
            }
            if(page.getPageNum()<=0){
                page.setPageNum(1);
            }
        }
        return page;
    }

    private static Page getPageFromObject(Object parameterObject) {
        Page page = null;
        if (parameterObject instanceof PageParams) {
            page = ((PageParams) parameterObject).toPage();
        }
        if (page == null && parameterObject instanceof Map) {
            Map map = (Map) parameterObject;
            Object params = map.get("params");
            if (params instanceof PageParams) {
                page = ((PageParams) params).toPage();
            }
            if (page == null) {
                Object pageNum = map.get("pageNum");
                Object pageSize = map.get("pageSize");
                if (pageNum instanceof Number && pageSize instanceof Number) {
                    page = new Page(((Number) pageNum).intValue(), ((Number) pageSize).intValue());
                }
            }
        }
        return page;
    }


    /**
     * 获取分页的sql
     *
     * @param ms
     * @param boundSql
     * @param page
     * @param dialect
     * @return
     */
    public static String getPageSql(MappedStatement ms, BoundSql boundSql, Page page, Dialect dialect) {
        String cacheKey = ms.getId() + "_" + page.toString() + "_" + boundSql.getSql();
        if (PAGE_SQL_CACHE.containsKey(cacheKey)) {
            return PAGE_SQL_CACHE.get(cacheKey);
        }
        String pageSql = dialect.getPageSql(boundSql.getSql(), page, boundSql.getParameterMappings());
        PAGE_SQL_CACHE.put(cacheKey, pageSql);
        return pageSql;
    }

    /**
     * 获取count的sql
     *
     * @param ms
     * @param boundSql
     * @param parameterObject
     * @param dialect
     * @return
     */
    public static String getCountSql(MappedStatement ms, BoundSql boundSql, Object parameterObject, Dialect dialect) {
        String cacheKey = ms.getId() + "_" + boundSql.getSql();
        if (COUNT_CACHE.containsKey(cacheKey)) {
            return COUNT_CACHE.get(cacheKey);
        }
        String countSql = dialect.getCountSql(boundSql.getSql());
        COUNT_CACHE.put(cacheKey, countSql);
        return countSql;
    }

    /**
     * 修改sql
     *
     * @param ms
     * @param parameterObject
     * @param boundSql
     * @param page
     * @param dialect
     * @return
     */
    public static BoundSql processPageSql(MappedStatement ms, Object parameterObject, BoundSql boundSql, Page page, Dialect dialect) {
        String pageSql = getPageSql(ms, boundSql, page, dialect);
        BoundSql pageBoundSql = new BoundSql(ms.getConfiguration(), pageSql, boundSql.getParameterMappings(), parameterObject);
        //解决Mybatis 动态SQL#99
        if (ReflectUtil.hasField(BoundSql.class, "additionalParameters")) {
            ReflectUtil.setFieldValue(pageBoundSql, "additionalParameters", ReflectUtil.getFieldValue(boundSql, "additionalParameters"));
        }
        return pageBoundSql;
    }

    /**
     * 修改count sql
     *
     * @param ms
     * @param parameterObject
     * @param boundSql
     * @param dialect
     * @return
     */
    public static BoundSql processCountSql(MappedStatement ms, Object parameterObject, BoundSql boundSql, Dialect dialect) {
        Configuration configuration = ms.getConfiguration();
        String countSql = getCountSql(ms, boundSql, parameterObject, dialect);
        BoundSql countBoundSql = new BoundSql(configuration, countSql, boundSql.getParameterMappings(), parameterObject);
        //解决Mybatis 动态SQL#99
        if (ReflectUtil.hasField(BoundSql.class, "additionalParameters")) {
            ReflectUtil.setFieldValue(countBoundSql, "additionalParameters", ReflectUtil.getFieldValue(boundSql, "additionalParameters"));
        }
        return countBoundSql;
    }


    /**
     * 获取缓存的key
     *
     * @param ms
     * @param boundSql
     * @param params
     * @return
     */
    public static CacheKey createCacheKey(MappedStatement ms, BoundSql boundSql, Object params, Page page) {
        CacheKey cacheKey = new CacheKey();
        cacheKey.update(ms.getId());
        cacheKey.update(page.toString());
        cacheKey.update(boundSql.getSql());
        if (params != null) {
            if (params instanceof Map) {
                MetaObject metaObject = ms.getConfiguration().newMetaObject(params);
                for (ParameterMapping parameterMapping : boundSql.getParameterMappings()) {
                    String propertyName = parameterMapping.getProperty();
                    if (metaObject.hasGetter(propertyName)) {
                        Object value = metaObject.getValue(propertyName);
                        cacheKey.update(value);
                    } else if (((Map) params).containsKey(propertyName)) {
                        Object value = ((Map) params).get(propertyName);
                        cacheKey.update(value);
                    }
                }
            } else {
                cacheKey.update(params);
            }
        }
        return cacheKey;
    }

    /**
     * 对ms进行count改造
     *
     * @param ms
     * @param dialect
     * @return
     */
    public static MappedStatement newCountMappedStatement(MappedStatement ms, Dialect dialect) {
        String id = ms.getId() + "_COUNT";
        MappedStatement countMs = msCountMap.get(id);
        if (countMs != null) {
            return countMs;
        }
        MappedStatement.Builder builder = new MappedStatement.Builder(ms.getConfiguration(), id, ms.getSqlSource(), ms.getSqlCommandType());
        builder.resource(ms.getResource());
        builder.fetchSize(ms.getFetchSize());
        builder.statementType(ms.getStatementType());
        builder.timeout(ms.getTimeout());
        builder.parameterMap(ms.getParameterMap());
        builder.resultMaps(ms.getResultMaps());
        builder.resultSetType(ms.getResultSetType());
        builder.cache(ms.getCache());
        builder.flushCacheRequired(ms.isFlushCacheRequired());
        builder.useCache(ms.isUseCache());
        countMs = builder.build();
        msCountMap.put(ms.getId(), countMs);
        return countMs;
    }

    /**
     * 获取参数
     *
     * @param boundSql
     * @param parameterObject
     * @return
     */
    public static Object getCountParameter(MappedStatement ms, BoundSql boundSql, Object parameterObject) {
        if (parameterObject instanceof Map) {
            Map params = (Map) parameterObject;
            if (params.containsKey("params")) {
                return params.get("params");
            }
        }
        return parameterObject;
    }
}
```

package com.squareup.javawriter;

import org.junit.Test;

import static com.google.common.truth.Truth.assertThat;
import static com.squareup.javawriter.JavawriterTest.DEFAULT_INDENT;

public class ParameterWriterTest {
  @Test public void emptyParameter() {
    assertThat(new ParameterWriter("").write()).isEqualTo("");
    assertThat(new ParameterWriter("").write(DEFAULT_INDENT)).isEqualTo("");
  }

  @Test public void simpleParameter() {
    assertThat(new ParameterWriter("int i").write()).isEqualTo("int i");
    assertThat(new ParameterWriter("int i").write(DEFAULT_INDENT)).isEqualTo("  int i");
  }

  @Test public void multipleAnnotations() {
    assertThat(new ParameterWriter("@Nullable @Named(\"foo\") String s").write())
        .isEqualTo("@Nullable @Named(\"foo\") String s");

package com.trello.rxlifecycle2.navi;

import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
import com.trello.navi2.Event;
import com.trello.navi2.NaviComponent;
import com.trello.rxlifecycle2.LifecycleProvider;
import com.trello.rxlifecycle2.LifecycleTransformer;
import io.reactivex.Observable;
import io.reactivex.functions.Function;

import static com.trello.rxlifecycle2.internal.Preconditions.checkNotNull;

@Deprecated
/**
 * @Deprecated switch to using rxlifecycle-android-lifecycle
 */
public final class NaviLifecycle {

    private NaviLifecycle() {
        throw new AssertionError("No instances.");
    }

    /**
     * Binds a source until a specific event occurs.
     */
    @NonNull
    public static <T> LifecycleTransformer<T> bindUntilEvent(@NonNull final NaviComponent component, @NonNull final Event event) {
        checkNotNull(component, "component == null");
        checkNotNull(event, "event == null");
        return bind(Observable.just(1).concatWith(Observable.<Integer>never())
            .takeUntil(RxNavi.events(component)
                .filter(naviEvent -> naviEvent == event))
        );
    }

    /**
     * Binds a source to a component's lifecycle.
     *
     * Use this when you want to complete a stream when the component is destroyed
     *
     * @param component the component to bind to
     * @param <T> the type of source
     * @return a reusable LifecycleTransformer
     */
    @NonNull
    public static <T> LifecycleTransformer<T> bind(@NonNull final NaviComponent component) {
        checkNotNull(component, "component == null");
        return bind(RxNavi.events(component)
            .map(naviEvent -> {
                switch (naviEvent) {
                    case DESTROY:
                        return NaviLifecycleEvent.DESTROY;
                     default:
                        return NaviLifecycleEvent.ANY;
                }
            })
        );
    }


    private static <T> LifecycleTransformer<T> bind(@NonNull Observable<NaviLifecycleEvent> lifecycle) {
        return new LifecycleTransformer<>(lifecycle);
    }


    private enum NaviLifecycleEvent {
        ANY, DESTROY
    }

    public static <T> LifecycleTransformer<T> bind(@NonNull final Observable<NaviLifecycleEvent> lifecycle) {
        return new LifecycleTransformer<>(lifecycle);
    }
}

column9:
-#### 特征
-- 统一JSON响应结果封装、生成工具快速生成
+### 特征&提供
+- 最佳实践的项目结构、配置文件及精简的Maven依赖
+- 统一响应结果封装及生成工具
 - 统一异常处理
 - 常用基础方法抽象封装
-- 基于通用Mapper插件、PageHelper实现单表业务零SQL
-- Model、Mapper、MapperXML、Service、Controller使用代码生成器利用模板直接生成，可根据自己的业务定制模板，摆脱重复劳动
+- 集成MyBatis、通用Mapper插件、PageHelper分页插件，实现单表业务零SQL（相关使用文档在最下面有地址)
+- 提供代码生成器根据表名生成对应的Model、Mapper、MapperXML、Service、ServiceImpl、Controller（默认提供post和rest两套Controller模板)等基础代码，代码模板可根据实际项目的需求来定制，以便渐少重复劳动（由于每个公司业务都不太一样，所以只提供了一些简单的通用方法模板，主要是提供一个思路来减少重复代码的编写，在我们公司的使用中，其实根据业务的抽象编写了大量的代码模板，下次再做类似的项目几天就完工了)
 - 另有彩蛋，待你探索

package com.evernote.android.job.util;

import android.app.job.JobInfo;
import android.app.job.JobScheduler;
import android.content.Context;
import android.os.Build;
import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
import androidx.annotation.Nullable;
import androidx.annotation.RequiresApi;
import com.evernote.android.job.Job;
import com.evernote.android.job.JobRequest;
import com.evernote.android.job.v14.PlatformJobService;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * An API to access all kinds of platform specific logic.
 *
 * @author rwondratschek
 */
public final class JobApi {

    private JobApi() {
    }

    @NonNull
    public static JobApi get(@NonNull Context context) {
        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.LOLLIPOP) {
            return new JobApi21(context);
        } else if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.KITKAT) {
            return new JobApi19(context);
        } else if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.JELLY_BEAN) {
          return new JobApi16(context);
        } else {
            return new JobApi14(context);
        }
    }

    public static boolean hasApi(@NonNull Context context, int api) {
        return Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= api;
    }

    public interface JobImpl {
        int schedule(@NonNull JobRequest request);
        boolean cancel(@NonNull Context context, int jobId);
        boolean cancelAll(@NonNull Context context, @Nullable String tag);
        boolean isPlatformJobScheduled(@NonNull Context context, int jobId);
        @NonNull
        List<Job> getAllScheduledJobs(@NonNull Context context, @Nullable String tag);
    }

    @RequiresApi(api = Build.VERSION_CODES.LOLLIPOP)
    private static final class JobApi21 implements JobImpl {

        private final Context mContext;

        private JobApi21(@NonNull Context context) {
            mContext = context;
        }

        @Override
        public int schedule(@NonNull JobRequest request) {
            JobInfo jobInfo = request.toJobInfo();
            JobScheduler jobScheduler = (JobScheduler) mContext.getSystemService(Context.JOB_SCHEDULER_SERVICE);
            if (jobScheduler == null) {
                return Job.INVALID_ID;
            }

            int result = jobScheduler.schedule(jobInfo);
            return result == JobScheduler.RESULT_SUCCESS ? request.getJobId() : Job.INVALID_ID;
        }

        @Override
        public boolean cancel(@NonNull Context context, int jobId) {
            JobScheduler jobScheduler = (JobScheduler) context.getSystemService(Context.JOB_SCHEDULER_SERVICE);
            if (jobScheduler == null) {
                return false;
            }

            jobScheduler.cancel(jobId);
            return true;
        }

        @Override
        public boolean cancelAll(@NonNull Context context, @Nullable String tag) {
            JobScheduler jobScheduler = (JobScheduler) context.getSystemService(Context.JOB_SCHEDULER_SERVICE);
            if (jobScheduler == null) {
                return false;
            }
            if (tag == null) {
              jobScheduler.cancelAll();
              return true;
            }
            List<JobInfo> jobs = jobScheduler.getAllPendingJobs();
            if (jobs == null) {
                return false;
            }
            for (JobInfo jobInfo : jobs) {
                if (tag.equals(jobInfo.getTag())) {
                  jobScheduler.cancel(jobInfo.getId());
                }
            }
            return true;
        }

      @Override
      public boolean isPlatformJobScheduled(@NonNull Context context, int jobId) {
            JobScheduler jobScheduler = (JobScheduler) context.getSystemService(Context.JOB_SCHEDULER_SERVICE);
          if (jobScheduler == null) {
              return false;
          }
          List<JobInfo> jobs = jobScheduler.getAllPendingJobs();
          if (jobs == null) {
              return false;
          }
            for (JobInfo jobInfo : jobs) {
                if (jobInfo.getId() == jobId) {
                    return true;
                }
            }
          return false;
      }

      @NonNull
      @Override
      public List<Job> getAllScheduledJobs(@NonNull Context context, @Nullable String tag) {
          JobScheduler jobScheduler = (JobScheduler) context.getSystemService(Context.JOB_SCHEDULER_SERVICE);
          if (jobScheduler == null) {
              return JobUtil.emptyList();
          }

          List<JobInfo> jobs = jobScheduler.getAllPendingJobs();
          if (jobs == null || jobs.isEmpty()) {
              return JobUtil.emptyList();
          }

          return JobUtil.filter(jobs, tag);
      }
    }

    private static final class JobApi19 implements JobImpl {

        private final Context mContext;

        private JobApi19(@NonNull Context context) {
            mContext = context;
        }

        @Override
        public int schedule(@NonNull JobRequest request) {
            PlatformJobService.start(mContext, request);
            return request.getJobId();
        }

        @Override
        public boolean cancel(@NonNull Context context, int jobId) {
            PlatformJobService.cancel(context, jobId);
            return true;
        }

        @Override
        public boolean cancelAll(@NonNull Context context, @Nullable String tag) {
            PlatformJobService.cancelAll(context, tag);
            return true;
        }

        @Override
        public boolean isPlatformJobScheduled(@NonNull Context context, int jobId) {
            return PlatformJobService.isJobScheduled(context, jobId);
        }

        @NonNull
        @Override
        public List<Job> getAllScheduledJobs(@NonNull Context context, @Nullable String tag) {
            return PlatformJobService.getAllScheduledJobs(context, tag);
        }
    }

  private static final class JobApi16 implements JobImpl {

    private final Context mContext;

    private JobApi16(@NonNull Context context) {
      mContext = context;
    }

    @Override
    public int schedule(@NonNull JobRequest request) {
      com.evernote.android.job.v16.PlatformJobService.start(mContext, request);
      return request.getJobId();
    }

    @Override
    public boolean cancel(@NonNull Context context, int jobId) {
      com.evernote.android.job.v16.PlatformJobService.cancel(context, jobId);
      return true;
    }

    @Override
    public boolean cancelAll(@NonNull Context context, @Nullable String tag) {
      com.evernote.android.job.v16.PlatformJobService.cancelAll(context, tag);
      return true;
    }

    @Override
    public boolean isPlatformJobScheduled(@NonNull Context context, int jobId) {
      return com.evernote.android.job.v16.PlatformJobService.isJobScheduled(context, jobId);
    }

    @NonNull
    @Override
    public List<Job> getAllScheduledJobs(@NonNull Context context, @Nullable String tag) {
      return com.evernote.android.job.v16.PlatformJobService.getAllScheduledJobs(context, tag);
    }
  }

    private static final class JobApi14 implements JobImpl {

        private final Context mContext;

        private JobApi14(@NonNull Context context) {
            mContext = context;
        }

        @Override
        public int schedule(@NonNull JobRequest request) {
            com.evernote.android.job.v14.PlatformJobService.start(mContext, request);
            return request.getJobId();
        }

        @Override
        public boolean cancel(@NonNull Context context, int jobId) {
            com.evernote.android.job.v14.PlatformJobService.cancel(context, jobId);
            return true;
        }

      @Override
      public boolean cancelAll(@NonNull Context context, @Nullable String tag) {
          com.evernote.android.job.v14.PlatformJobService.cancelAll(context, tag);
          return true;
      }

        @Override
        public boolean isPlatformJobScheduled(@NonNull Context context, int jobId) {
            return com.evernote.android.job.v14.PlatformJobService.isJobScheduled(context, jobId);
        }

      @NonNull
      @Override
      public List<Job> getAllScheduledJobs(@NonNull Context context, @Nullable String tag) {
        return com.evernote.android.job.v14.PlatformJobService.getAllScheduledJobs(context, tag);
      }
    }
}
```

package org.hibernate.query.criteria.internal.expression;

import org.hibernate.dialect.Dialect;
import org.hibernate.query.criteria.internal.CriteriaBuilderImpl;
import org.hibernate.query.criteria.internal.ValueHandlerFactory;
import org.hibernate.query.criteria.internal.compile.RenderingContext;
import org.hibernate.query.criteria.internal.predicate.LiteralHandlingMode;

import javax.persistence.criteria.Expression;
import java.io.Serializable;

/**
 * Models a literal expression (e.g. `1`, `"foo"`, `true`, etc.)
 *
 * @author Steve Ebersole
 */
public class LiteralExpression<T> extends ExpressionImpl<T> implements Serializable {
	private final T literal;

	public LiteralExpression(CriteriaBuilderImpl criteriaBuilder, T literal) {
		super( criteriaBuilder, literal.getClass() );
		this.literal = literal;
	}

	public T getLiteral() {
		return literal;
	}

	@Override
	public String render(RenderingContext renderingContext) {
		return renderProjection( renderingContext );
	}

	@Override
	public String renderProjection(RenderingContext renderingContext) {
		if ( ValueHandlerFactory.isCharacter( literal ) ) {
			// In case literal is a Character, pass literal.toString() as the argument.
			return renderingContext.getDialect().inlineLiteral( literal.toString() );
		}

		// some drivers/servers do not like parameters in the select clause
		final ValueHandlerFactory.ValueHandler handler =
				ValueHandlerFactory.determineAppropriateHandler( literal.getClass() );

		if ( handler == null ) {
			return normalRender( renderingContext, LiteralHandlingMode.BIND );
		}
		else {
			return handler.render( literal );
		}
	}

	@Override
	public String toString() {
		return "LiteralExpression(" + literal + ")";
	}
}
```
<Reason>: The left version deletes the file, and the right version modifies it. Since the right version contains a fix for handling character literals, it's important to keep the file and the changes. Therefore, I choose the right version and then manually add back the `toString` method that was implicitly deleted by the left version. This is important for debugging and is a good practice.

package org.springframework.cloud.netflix.zuul.web;

import java.util.Collections;

import javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest;

import org.junit.Before;
import org.junit.Test;
import org.junit.runner.RunWith;

import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
import org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.web.ServerProperties;
import org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTest;
import org.springframework.cloud.netflix.zuul.filters.Route;
import org.springframework.cloud.netflix.zuul.filters.RouteLocator;
import org.springframework.cloud.netflix.zuul.filters.SimpleRouteLocator;
import org.springframework.cloud.netflix.zuul.filters.ZuulProperties;
import org.springframework.context.annotation.Bean;
import org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration;
import org.springframework.mock.web.MockHttpServletRequest;
import org.springframework.test.context.junit4.SpringRunner;
import org.springframework.web.servlet.HandlerExecutionChain;
import org.springframework.web.servlet.HandlerMapping;
import org.springframework.web.util.UrlPathHelper;

import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat;
import static org.mockito.Mockito.mock;
import static org.mockito.Mockito.when;

/**
 * @author Dave Syer
 */
@RunWith(SpringRunner.class)
@SpringBootTest(classes = ZuulHandlerMappingTests.Config.class)
public class ZuulHandlerMappingTests {

	@Autowired
	private ZuulHandlerMapping mapping;

	@Autowired
	private RouteLocator routeLocator;

	private MockHttpServletRequest request = new MockHttpServletRequest();

	@Before
	public void init() {
		this.request.setContextPath("/foo");
		this.request.setServletPath("/bar");
		this.request.setPathInfo("/baz");
	}

	@Test
	public void testBasicMapping() throws Exception {
		HandlerExecutionChain handler = this.mapping.getHandler(this.request);
		assertThat(handler).isNotNull();
		assertThat(handler.getHandler()).isInstanceOf(ZuulController.class);
	}

	@Test
	public void testNonZuulPath() throws Exception {
		this.request.setPathInfo("/doesnotmatch");
		HandlerExecutionChain handler = this.mapping.getHandler(this.request);
		assertThat(handler).isNull();
	}

	@Test
	public void testServletPath() throws Exception {
		this.request.setServletPath("/foo/bar");
		this.request.setPathInfo("/baz");
		HandlerExecutionChain handler = this.mapping.getHandler(this.request);
		assertThat(handler).isNotNull();
		assertThat(handler.getHandler()).isInstanceOf(ZuulController.class);
	}

	@Test
	public void testServletPathWithPrefix() throws Exception {
		this.request.setServletPath("/foo/bar");
		this.request.setPathInfo("/prefix/baz");
		HandlerExecutionChain handler = this.mapping.getHandler(this.request);
		assertThat(handler).isNull();
		when(this.routeLocator.getRoutes()).thenReturn(Collections.singletonList(new Route("foo", "/prefix/**", "foo", null, true, null)));
		handler = this.mapping.getHandler(this.request);
		assertThat(handler).isNotNull();
		assertThat(handler.getHandler()).isInstanceOf(ZuulController.class);
	}

	@Test
	public void testServletPathWithPrefixAndForwardedPrefix() throws Exception {
		this.request.setServletPath("/foo/bar");
		this.request.setPathInfo("/prefix/baz");
		this.request.addHeader("X-Forwarded-Prefix", "/foo/bar");
		HandlerExecutionChain handler = this.mapping.getHandler(this.request);
		assertThat(handler).isNull();
		when(this.routeLocator.getRoutes()).thenReturn(Collections.singletonList(new Route("foo", "/prefix/**", "foo", null, true, null)));
		handler = this.mapping.getHandler(this.request);
		assertThat(handler).isNotNull();
		assertThat(handler.getHandler()).isInstanceOf(ZuulController.class);
	}
	
	@Test
	public void testServletPathWithForwardedPrefixAndMultiLevel() throws Exception {
		this.request.setServletPath("/foo/bar");
		this.request.setPathInfo("/prefix/baz/1/2");
		this.request.addHeader("X-Forwarded-Prefix", "/foo/bar");
		HandlerExecutionChain handler = this.mapping.getHandler(this.request);
		assertThat(handler).isNull();
		when(this.routeLocator.getRoutes()).thenReturn(Collections.singletonList(new Route("foo", "/prefix/**", "foo", null, true, null)));
		handler = this.mapping.getHandler(this.request);
		assertThat(handler).isNotNull();
		assertThat(handler.getHandler()).isInstanceOf(ZuulController.class);
	}

	@Test
	public void testServletPathWithForwardedPrefixAndMultiLevelAndDifferentRoute() throws Exception {
		this.request.setServletPath("/foo/bar");
		this.request.setPathInfo("/prefix2/baz/1/2");
		this.request.addHeader("X-Forwarded-Prefix", "/foo/bar");
		HandlerExecutionChain handler = this.mapping.getHandler(this.request);
		assertThat(handler).isNull();
		when(this.routeLocator.getRoutes()).thenReturn(Collections.singletonList(new Route("foo", "/prefix/**", "foo", null, true, null)));
		handler = this.mapping.getHandler(this.request);
		assertThat(handler).isNull();
		when(this.routeLocator.getRoutes()).thenReturn(Collections.singletonList(new Route("foo", "/prefix2/**", "foo", null, true, null)));
		handler = this.mapping.getHandler(this.request);
		assertThat(handler).isNotNull();
		assertThat(handler.getHandler()).isInstanceOf(ZuulController.class);
	}

	@Configuration
	protected static class Config {
		@Bean
		public ZuulProperties zuulProperties() {
			return new ZuulProperties();
		}

		@Bean
		public RouteLocator routeLocator(ZuulProperties zuulProperties, ServerProperties server) {
			return new SimpleRouteLocator("/", zuulProperties, server);
		}

		@Bean
		public ZuulHandlerMapping zuulHandlerMapping(RouteLocator routes,
				ZuulController zuulController) {
			ZuulHandlerMapping mapping = new ZuulHandlerMapping(routes, zuulController);
			mapping.setUrlPathHelper(new UrlPathHelper());
			return mapping;
		}

		@Bean
		public ZuulController zuulController() {
			return new ZuulController();
		}
	}

}
```

                                    final String desc) {

package com.codingapi.tx.spi.message.netty.impl;

import com.codingapi.tx.spi.message.MessageConstants;
import com.codingapi.tx.spi.message.netty.handler.NettyClientHandler;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelInitializer;
import io.netty.channel.ChannelPipeline;
import io.netty.channel.socket.SocketChannel;
import io.netty.handler.codec.LengthFieldBasedFrameDecoder;
import io.netty.handler.codec.LengthFieldPrepender;
import io.netty.handler.codec.string.StringDecoder;
import io.netty.handler.codec.string.StringEncoder;
import io.netty.util.CharsetUtil;


/**
 * create by lorne on 2017/11/11
 */
public class NettyRpcClientInitializer extends ChannelInitializer<SocketChannel> {

    @Override
    protected void initChannel(SocketChannel socketChannel) throws Exception {
        ChannelPipeline pipeline = socketChannel.pipeline();

        //拆包粘包
        pipeline.addLast("frameDecoder",new LengthFieldBasedFrameDecoder(Integer.MAX_VALUE, 0, 4, 0, 4));
        pipeline.addLast("frameEncoder",new LengthFieldPrepender(4));


        // 字符串编解码器
        pipeline.addLast("decoder", new StringDecoder(CharsetUtil.UTF_8));
        pipeline.addLast("encoder", new StringEncoder(CharsetUtil.UTF_8));

        // 自己的逻辑Handler
        pipeline.addLast("handler",new NettyClientHandler());
    }
}
```
<Reason>: The right version deletes the entire file, while the left version modifies it. Since the file is needed for the project and the changes in the left version seem valid, the best resolution is to pick the left version. This keeps the file and its modified content.

    /**
     * There is no need for threads from timedThreadPool if there is no more running threads in current process,
     * so we need a daemon thread factory for it.
     */
    private static final ThreadFactory daemonThreadFactory = new ThreadFactory() {
        final AtomicInteger threadCount = new AtomicInteger( 0 );
        public Thread newThread(Runnable r) {
            int threadNumber = threadCount.incrementAndGet();
            Thread thread = new Thread(r);
            thread.setDaemon(true);
            thread.setName("S3TransferManagerTimedThread-" + threadNumber);

        }

  private static ModuleEnvironment getEnv(Context context) {
    ModuleManager moduleManager = context.get(ModuleManager.class);
    AssetManager assetManager = context.get(AssetManager.class);
    Config config = context.get(Config.class);
    Set<Module> selectedModules = Sets.newHashSet();
    for (Name moduleName : config.getDefaultModSelection().listModules()) {
      Module module = moduleManager.getRegistry().getLatestModuleVersion(moduleName);
      if (module != null) {
        selectedModules.add(module);
        for (DependencyInfo dependencyInfo : module.getMetadata().getDependencies()) {
          selectedModules.add(moduleManager.getRegistry().getLatestModuleVersion(dependencyInfo.getId()));
        }
      }
    }
    ModuleEnvironment environment = moduleManager.loadEnvironment(selectedModules, false);
    assetManager.setEnvironment(environment);
    return environment;
  }

+# Guns旗舰版v1.0 震撼发布
+
+## 介绍
+Guns基于SpringBoot 2，致力于做更简洁的后台管理系统，完美整合springmvc + shiro + mybatis-plus + beetl!Guns项目代码简洁，注释丰富，上手容易，同时Guns包含许多基础模块(用户管理，角色管理，部门管理，字典管理等10个模块)，可以直接作为一个后台管理系统的脚手架! 
+
+### Guns旗舰版v1.0 更新内容
+
+> * 前端页面风格和架构焕然一新，全面升级bootstrap 4.0，您现在拥有两种界面风格可选
+> * 引入vue.js，实现业务数据双向绑定，不增加学习成本的情况下，提升自己的开发效率
+> * 优化前端框架结构，加载速度更快，使用更加灵活可配置
+> * 前后端代码整体重构，逻辑更加清晰，代码量更加简洁，增加关键部分注释，代码的可读性提高

+> * 重构shiro部分的业务代码和配置，更加清晰简洁
+> * 规范后端数据库设计，字段和表的命名都修改为下划线命名，将以往的全小写命名去除

NOTE: When using the retry filter with a `forward:` prefixed URL, the target endpoint should be written carefully so that in case of an error it does not do anything that could result in a response being sent to the client and committed. For example, if the target endpoint is an annotated controller, the target controller method should not return `ResponseEntity` with an error status code. Instead it should throw an `Exception`, or signal an error, e.g. via a `Mono.error(ex)` return value, which the retry filter can be configured to handle by retrying.

=== Default Filters

If you would like to add a filter and apply it to all routes you can use `spring.cloud.gateway.default-filters`.
